ddls:
CREATE TABLE "resolutions" (
  "resolution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resolution */,
  "resolution_no" TEXT /* Resolution number (e.g., A/RES/608(VI)) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the resolution (e.g., Draft, Adopted, Rejected) */,
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the committee that passed the resolution */,
  "agenda_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agenda item */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic */,
  "meeting_record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meeting record */,
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vote result */,
  "draft_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the draft document */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the latest version of the resolution */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the meeting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resolution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resolution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resolutions_draft_id FOREIGN KEY ("draft_id") REFERENCES drafts ("draft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resolutions_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resolutions_agenda_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("agenda_item_id") REFERENCES agenda_items ("agenda_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resolutions_vote_id FOREIGN KEY ("vote_id") REFERENCES votes ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resolutions_committee_id FOREIGN KEY ("committee_id") REFERENCES committees ("committee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resolutions_meeting_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("meeting_record_id") REFERENCES meeting_records ("meeting_record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drafts" (
  "draft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each draft document */,
  "draft_no" TEXT /* Draft number (e.g., A/2095) */,
  "draft_date" TEXT /* Date the draft was created */,
  "draft_author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who created the draft */,
  "draft_status" TEXT /* Current status of the draft (e.g., Draft, Final) */,
  "draft_version" INTEGER /* Version number of the draft */,
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the committee that created the draft */,
  "agenda_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agenda item related to the draft */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic of the draft */,
  "meeting_record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meeting record where the draft was discussed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("draft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drafts_agenda_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("agenda_item_id") REFERENCES agenda_items ("agenda_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drafts_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drafts_meeting_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("meeting_record_id") REFERENCES meeting_records ("meeting_record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drafts_committee_id FOREIGN KEY ("committee_id") REFERENCES committees ("committee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drafts_draft_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("draft_author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "committees" (
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each committee */,
  "committee_name" TEXT /* Name of the committee (e.g., Plenary, C.6) */,
  "committee_description" TEXT /* Description of the committee */,
  "chair_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chairperson of the committee */,
  "secretariat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the secretariat responsible for the committee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("committee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_committees_secretariat_id FOREIGN KEY ("secretariat_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_committees_chair_id FOREIGN KEY ("chair_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agenda_items" (
  "agenda_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agenda item */,
  "agenda_item_no" TEXT /* Agenda item number */,
  "agenda_item_description" TEXT /* Description of the agenda item */,
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the committee that the agenda item belongs to */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the agenda item (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agenda_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agenda_items_committee_id FOREIGN KEY ("committee_id") REFERENCES committees ("committee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "topic_description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the topic (e.g., Peace, Finance, Human Rights) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meeting_records" (
  "meeting_record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meeting record */,
  "meeting_record_no" TEXT /* Meeting record number (e.g., A/PV.368) */,
  "meeting_date" TEXT /* Date of the meeting */,
  "meeting_location" TEXT /* Location of the meeting */,
  "meeting_description" TEXT /* Description of the meeting */,
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the committee that the meeting belongs to */,
  "chair_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chairperson of the meeting */,
  "secretariat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the secretariat responsible for the meeting */,
  "agenda_items" TEXT /* List of agenda items discussed in the meeting (JSON array of agenda item IDs) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meeting_record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meeting_records_committee_id FOREIGN KEY ("committee_id") REFERENCES committees ("committee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meeting_records_chair_id FOREIGN KEY ("chair_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meeting_records_secretariat_id FOREIGN KEY ("secretariat_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "vote_result" TEXT /* Result of the vote (e.g., 45-5-0 non-recorded, without vote) */,
  "vote_description" TEXT /* Description of the vote */,
  "meeting_record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meeting record where the vote took place */,
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the committee that conducted the vote */,
  "vote_type" TEXT /* Type of vote (e.g., Recorded, Non-Recorded) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_meeting_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("meeting_record_id") REFERENCES meeting_records ("meeting_record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_committee_id FOREIGN KEY ("committee_id") REFERENCES committees ("committee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "author_email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "author_role" TEXT /* Role of the author (e.g., Delegate, Staff) */,
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the committee the author belongs to */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team or department the author is part of (e.g., Legal, Research) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_authors_committee_id FOREIGN KEY ("committee_id") REFERENCES committees ("committee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Delegate, Staff, Admin) */,
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the committee the user belongs to */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team or department the user is part of (e.g., Legal, Research) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions for the user (JSON array of permissions) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_committee_id FOREIGN KEY ("committee_id") REFERENCES committees ("committee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "resolution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resolution being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the resolution */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the resolution was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Specific action performed (e.g., View, Download, Edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_resolution_id FOREIGN KEY ("resolution_id") REFERENCES resolutions ("resolution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resolution_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "resolution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resolution */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the changes */,
  "draft_id" INTEGER /* ID of the draft if the version is based on a draft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resolution_versions_resolution_id FOREIGN KEY ("resolution_id") REFERENCES resolutions ("resolution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resolution_versions_draft_id FOREIGN KEY ("draft_id") REFERENCES drafts ("draft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resolution_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
